text: Param Patel is an AI/ML Engineer, Full Stack Developer, and entrepreneur passionate about building intelligent software systems. His interests include artificial intelligence, machine learning, agentic AI, distributed systems, code intelligence, and developer tooling. He enjoys building scalable products that solve real-world engineering problems.

Built a deepfake detection system using a multi-model ensemble architecture: EfficientNet-B0 for spatial CNN analysis, LSTM for temporal patterns, Wav2Vec2 for audio analysis, plus frequency-domain and metadata detectors, combined via ensemble fusion.
Developed 'Jarvis', an AI orchestration engine. Pivoted from a standard chatbot UI paradigm to a multi-agent orchestration architecture where autonomous agents hand off tasks.
Worked on CERT-IN Verification engines. Scaled verification systems for chaotic, unstructured global educational resources. Focused on handling edge cases at scale and preventing LLM hallucinations.
Led the Entrepreneurship Cell. Scaled and managed a 30-member execution team, focusing on human system orchestration, event coordination, and strategic communication.
Programming & Infrastructure Skills: Python, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, SQL. Cloud & DevOps: Git, GitHub, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, SaaS Development, Serverless Computing, Cloud Deployment.
AI & ML Expertise: Machine Learning, Neural Networks, RAG, Prompt Engineering, LLM Applications, Tool Calling, Agentic AI, Autonomous AI Systems, Multi-Agent Workflows, Model Evaluation.
Full Stack Development Skills: React, Node.js, Django, REST APIs, Microservices, Single Page Applications, Database Design (SQL/NoSQL).
Business & Leadership Skills: Product Thinking, Startup Strategy, MVP Planning, SaaS Product Development, Team Management, Public Speaking, UI/UX Design.

Currently building a pre-incorporation AI/ML startup focused on AI-powered codebase intelligence, software architecture understanding, developer productivity, and intelligent systems engineering tools.
